roles.name: Academic Coordinator
roles.description: Coordinates academic programs, timetables, exam schedules, and curriculum planning.

roles.name: Accountant
roles.description: Accounts administrator. Manages student fee configuration, collections, invoices, and salaries.

roles.name: Expense Manager
roles.description: Expense manager. Oversees school expenses, financial reporting, and budgeting.

roles.name: Librarian
roles.description: School librarian. Manages library resources, student access, and catalog records.

roles.name: Parent
roles.description: Parent portal. Tracks children attendance logs, grades, and invoice statuses.

roles.name: Principal
roles.description: School principal with full administrative access to all modules and system settings.

roles.name: Receptionist
roles.description: Front-office receptionist. Manages admissions registration, visitor books, and calendar schedules.

roles.name: Student
roles.description: Student portal. Views timetables, exam reports, notices, and events.

roles.name: Subject Teacher
roles.description: Subject teacher. Records attendance, enters marks, manages academic activities, and views student profiles.

roles.name: Vice Principal
roles.description: Vice principal with broad access to academics, staff, and student management.
